action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py has a critical bug - it uses key-based model type detection ('patch_embed' in keys) but BOTH DINOv2 and CLIP models have 'patch_embed' in their state dict keys, causing best.pt to be loaded as CLIPClassifier instead of WildlifeClassifier. This produces garbage predictions that drag the ensemble from 0.6316 down to 0.539. Analysis: Fix by using filename-based model type detection instead of key-based. Also ensure predict.py is complete (not truncated). Decision: Rewrite predict.py with hardcoded model type per checkpoint filename, equal-weight ensemble of best.pt (DINOv2) + clip_best.pt (CLIP), submit eval immediately.
